verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are the source of life I can't be left behind No one else will do I will take hold of You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: 'Cause I need You Jesus, To come to my rescue Where else can I go? There's no other name By which I am saved Capture me with grace, I will follow You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My heart is Yours for life I need Your hand in mine No one else will do I put my trust in You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: This world has nothing for me I will follow You This world has nothing for me I will trust in You
